languages.text: Машинный дух подъемника пробудился. Настало время встретиться с Нунциусом и помочь Эоганну решить его судьбу.
The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.
languages.original_text: Машинный дух подъемника пробудился. Настало время встретиться с Нунциусом и помочь Эоганну решить его судьбу.

traits.locale_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.
The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.
The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

languages.text: Der Maschinengeist des Aufzugs wurde erweckt. Es wird Zeit, Nuncius zu treffen und Eogunn zu helfen, sein Schicksal zu bestimmen.
languages.original_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

traits.locale_text: Der Maschinengeist des Aufzugs wurde erweckt. Es wird Zeit, Nuncius zu treffen und Eogunn zu helfen, sein Schicksal zu bestimmen.

languages.text: L'esprit de la machine de l'ascenseur s'est éveillé. Il est temps d'aller rencontrer Nuncius et d'aider Eogunn à décider de son sort.
languages.original_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

traits.locale_text: L'esprit de la machine de l'ascenseur s'est éveillé. Il est temps d'aller rencontrer Nuncius et d'aider Eogunn à décider de son sort.

languages.text: 电梯的机魂已经苏醒。是时候去见努恩修斯，帮助伊奥贡决定他的命运了。
languages.original_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

traits.locale_text: 电梯的机魂已经苏醒。是时候去见努恩修斯，帮助伊奥贡决定他的命运了。

languages.text: El espíritu máquina del ascensor ha despertado. Es hora de conocer a Nuncius y ayudar a Eogunn a decidir su destino.
languages.original_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

traits.locale_text: El espíritu máquina del ascensor ha despertado. Es hora de conocer a Nuncius y ayudar a Eogunn a decidir su destino.

languages.text: リフトのマシン・スピリットが目覚めた。ヌンシウスに会い、エオグンの運命を決める手助けをする時が来た。
languages.original_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

languages.text: Asansörün makine ruhu uyandı. Artık Nuncius ile görüşme ve Eogunn'un onun kaderini belirlemesine yardım etme zamanı.
languages.original_text: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.

traits.locale_text: Asansörün makine ruhu uyandı. Artık Nuncius ile görüşme ve Eogunn'un onun kaderini belirlemesine yardım etme zamanı.
